text.title: Negative Result Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a negative-result Markdown artifact and its index row. Agent must satisfy this before merging the spike-close PR.

field.name: outcome
field.notes: must contain at least one numeric measurement

field.name: retry_condition
field.notes: must list at least one concrete observable trigger

forbidden.pattern: free-text tag not present in TAGS.md
retry_condition equals the string Maybe, TBD, Someday, When ready, or empty
outcome paragraph without any numeric measurement (no percentage, latency, cost, accuracy, or count)
attached_data list includes a notebook (.ipynb) or a checkpoint (.pt, .ckpt, .safetensors) larger than 5 MB
frontmatter.cost_usd missing or set to 0 (cost is the budget-justification signal; record it)
hypothesis written after the outcome was known (retrofitted hypothesis); detector: hypothesis paragraph mentions the failure mode by name

allowed-transformations.transformation: Compress the outcome paragraph to its load-bearing sentences; never embellish.
Round cost_usd to nearest $50 below $1k, nearest $500 above $1k.
Replace personal names in attached log excerpts with role labels (engineer-A, reviewer-B) when the team is public-facing.

list.item: All three blocks (HYPOTHESIS, OUTCOME, RETRY-CONDITION) present and named
RETRY-CONDITION contains at least one observable trigger
OUTCOME has at least one numeric measurement
Every tag in frontmatter.tags exists in negative-results/TAGS.md
index.yaml regenerated and committed in the same PR
Team-visible surface (channel, wiki, PR description) links to this entry
Cost field populated with a real estimate, not zero
